name: 25.5" Sculptural Upholstered and Wood Boucle Counter Height Barstool with Footrest Cream - Threshold™
description:
Bring a touch of comfortable style to your eat-in kitchen or bar area with this Sculptural Upholstered Wooden Counter-Height Barstool from Threshold™. Supported on a wooden frame, this counter-height bar stool features a round upholstered seat with an open raised backrest with upholstery for comfort. Best of all, a built-in footrest lets you rest your feet comfortably while enjoying your meals or drinks. Showcasing a stained wooden finish with cream upholstery, it features sculptural accents for a touch of style.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
